ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "gene_status" TEXT /* Status of the gene (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "gene_synonyms" TEXT /* Alternative names for the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the gene */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the gene belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the gene record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of the cluster (e.g., shared_acceptor) */,
  "n_start" INTEGER /* Starting index of the cluster */,
  "n_genes" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the cluster */,
  "n_genes_cluster" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the cluster */,
  "cluster_status" TEXT /* Status of the cluster (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "cluster_source" TEXT /* Source of the cluster data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the cluster record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene that contains the exon */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Exon number within the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the exon */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the exon */,
  "exon_type" TEXT /* Type of the exon (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  "exon_status" TEXT /* Status of the exon (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "exon_description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the exon */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the exon record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splice_events" (
  "splice_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each splicing event */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene involved in the splicing event */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster where the splicing event occurs */,
  "psi_a" REAL /* PSI value for condition A */,
  "psi_b" REAL /* PSI value for condition B */,
  "delta_psi" REAL /* Change in PSI value between conditions A and B */,
  "lfc_psi" REAL /* Log2 Fold Change in PSI value */,
  "abs_delta_psi" REAL /* Absolute change in PSI value */,
  "abs_lfc_psi" REAL /* Absolute Log2 Fold Change in PSI value */,
  "original_cluster" INTEGER /* Original cluster ID */,
  "splice_event_type" TEXT /* Type of the splicing event (e.g., cassette exon, intron retention) */,
  "splice_event_status" TEXT /* Status of the splicing event (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "splice_event_description" TEXT /* Brief description or summary of the splicing event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the splicing event record was updated */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the splicing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("splice_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splice_events_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splice_events_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user was active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being annotated */,
  "splice_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the splicing event being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text content of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, reviewed) */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., note, hypothesis, conclusion) */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the annotation record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_splice_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("splice_event_id") REFERENCES splice_events ("splice_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "splice_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the splicing event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_splice_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("splice_event_id") REFERENCES splice_events ("splice_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
